ddls:
CREATE TABLE "immunological_data" (
  "accession_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the protein sequence */,
  "protein_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein */,
  "antigen_presenting_protein" TEXT /* MHC type presenting the antigen */,
  "allele" TEXT /* Allele associated with the protein */,
  "seq_num" INTEGER /* Sequence number indicating peptide's position */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the peptide in the protein sequence */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the peptide in the protein sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide */,
  "peptide" TEXT /* The peptide sequence */,
  "core" TEXT /* Core sequence of the peptide */,
  "icore" TEXT /* Icore sequence of the peptide */,
  "score" REAL /* Immunogenicity score for the peptide */,
  "rank" REAL /* Rank of the peptide based on its score */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this data is part of */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accession_code", "seq_num", "version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunological_data_peptide FOREIGN KEY ("peptide") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_sequence"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunological_data_allele FOREIGN KEY ("allele") REFERENCES alleles ("allele_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunological_data_score FOREIGN KEY ("score") REFERENCES scores ("score_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunological_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alleles" (
  "allele_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allele */,
  "allele_name" TEXT /* Name of the allele */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the allele's properties */,
  "mhc_type" TEXT /* Type of MHC molecule (MHC-I, MHC-II) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the allele was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allele_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "peptide_sequence" TEXT /* The peptide sequence itself */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide */,
  "core" TEXT /* Core sequence of the peptide */,
  "icore" TEXT /* Icore sequence of the peptide */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the peptide was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the immunogenicity score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or remarks about this score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the score was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or department the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the experiment results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who accessed the data */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Identifier of the data accessed (e.g., accession_code) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the protein sequence
